deploy.startCommand: sh -c 'export DIRECT_URL=${DIRECT_URL:-$DATABASE_URL}; timeout 30 sh -c "node node_modules/prisma/build/index.js migrate resolve --applied 0001_initial 2>/dev/null; node node_modules/prisma/build/index.js migrate deploy" || echo "Migration skipped"; node scripts/seed.mjs || echo "Seed skipped"; exec node server.js'
